explanation: ICE cream, ICE skate, ICE water — all common compounds with ICE.
GOLDfish, GOLD mine, GOLD rush — classic GOLD compounds.
THUNDERstorm, SNOWstorm, BRAINstorm — all types of storms.
PINEapple, CRABapple, APPLEsauce — all use APPLE.
MOONlight, STARlight, FLASHlight — all LIGHT compounds.
CHEESEcake, BIRTHDAYcake, CUPcake — all types of CAKE.
BASKETball, EIGHTball, SNOWball — all BALL compounds.
STRAWberry, BLUEberry, RASPberry — all types of BERRY.
BOOKworm, EARworm, TAPEworm — all WORM compounds.
RIVERbank, NOTEbank (or bank note), BANKbook — all use BANK.
BLOODhound, BLOOD pressure, BLOOD shot — all BLOOD compounds.
ARMpit, COALpit, PEACHpit — all PIT compounds.
SPACEship, OUTERspace, SPACEcraft — all SPACE compounds.
BIRTHday, ANYday, EVERYday — all DAY compounds.
underSTAND, grandSTAND, HANDstand — all use STAND.
HORSEfly, FIREfly, MAYfly — all types of fly.
masterKEY, SKELETONkey, CARkey — all KEY compounds.
OVERage, MIDDLE AGE, STONE AGE — all AGE phrases.
FINGERnail, TOEnail, HANGnail — all NAIL compounds.
BULLETproof, WATERproof, FIREproof — all PROOF compounds.
FOSTERmother, STEPmother, GRANDmother — all MOTHER compounds.
BREAKdown, CRACKdown, SHAKEdown — all DOWN compounds.
SANDstorm, DUSTstorm, SNOWstorm — all STORM compounds.
OVERtime, HALF TIME, PARTtime — all TIME compounds.
HOUSEhold, FREEhold, SHAREholder — all HOLD compounds.
FOREground, BACKground, PLAYground — all GROUND compounds.
OUTburst, BREAKburst (daybreak/burst), SUNburst — all BURST compounds.
STEAMboat, PADDLEboat, RIVERboat — all BOAT compounds.
SCHOOLmaster, POSTmaster, GRANDmaster — all MASTER compounds.
NEWSprint, BLUEprint, THUMBprint — all PRINT compounds.
CAMPground, PLAYground, COMMONground — all GROUND compounds.
OVERhand, RIGHThand, LEFThand — all HAND compounds.
BARBERchair, ROCKINGchair, FOLDing chair — all types of CHAIR.
NECKwear, NIGHTwear, EYEwear — all WEAR compounds.
STUNTword... crossWORD, DOUBLEcross... Actually: crossWORD, doubleWORD, stuntWORD — crossword is the clearest connection through WORD compounds.
BIRTHDAYparty, SURPRISEparty, GARDENparty — all PARTY compounds.
BUTTERfly, DRAGONfly, HOUSEfly — all types of FLY.
SALTsea (sea salt), DEEP SEA, SEAfoam — all SEA compounds.
MATCHbox, MATCHstick, MATCHbook — all MATCH compounds.
SNOWball, FIREball, FOOTball — all BALL compounds.
SPOTlight, FLASHlight, FLOODlight — all LIGHT compounds.
HANDbag, SANDbag, PAPERbag — all BAG compounds.
AIRfall (downfall), WINDfall, RAINfall — all FALL compounds.
GATEkeeper, GOALkeeper, DOORkeeper — all KEEPER compounds.
FIREwork, GROUNDwork, TEAMwork — all WORK compounds.
HEADband, HAIRband, ROCKband — all BAND compounds.
SUNglass, EYEglass, WINEglass — all GLASS compounds.
FOOTprint, BLUEprint, FINGERprint — all PRINT compounds.
OVERcoat, RAINcoat, TOPcoat — all COAT compounds.
SWEETcorn, SWEETpepper, SWEETtalk — all SWEET compounds.
THUNDERstorm, BRAINstorm, DUSTstorm — all STORM compounds.
BOOKbreak (breakbook?), BOOKmark, BOOKshelf — BOOKMARK and BOOKSHELF are clear BOOK compounds; BOOKBREAK uses the reverse.
GOLDfish, GOLDmine, GOLDfield — all GOLD compounds.
TROUBLEmaker, MATCHmaker, BOOKmaker — all MAKER compounds.
SHOULDERblade, RAZORblade, GRASSblade — all BLADE compounds.
OVERsight, FORESight, INsight — all SIGHT compounds.
SOFTware, HARDware, SHAREware — all WARE compounds.
FIREplace, BIRTHplace, COMMONplace — all PLACE compounds.
CLOCKwork, FRAMEwork, BOOKwork — all WORK compounds.
UNDERworld, UNDERground, UNDERwater — all UNDER compounds.
